prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on the Geometric Brownian Motion model. ZTS's historical daily returns over the past year (2023-06-19 to 2024-06-19) were used to estimate an average daily drift (0.01%) and daily volatility (1.36%). The point estimate is the expected value of the stock price in 6 trading days. The confidence intervals are derived from the quantiles of the log-normal distribution, reflecting the inherent uncertainty in future price movements based on historical volatility.
